message:
Add event suggestion templates and fix InjectionResult::Error handling

- Add manual_fix, preview_command, learn_more_url fields to RuleDef struct
- Implement interpolate_template() method for {pane}, {event_id}, {agent}, {rule_id} vars
- Add get_preview_command() and get_manual_fix() methods
- Populate suggestions for workflow-enabled rules:
  - codex.usage.warning_5
  - codex.usage.reached
  - claude_code.compaction
  - claude_code.usage.reached
  - gemini.usage.reached
- Fix missing InjectionResult::Error match arm in workflows.rs
- Update test helpers with new RuleDef fields

Closes: wa-bnm.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
